results.snippet: The set is later released as the Live Peace In Toronto 1969 album. Basically a supergroup with revolving members headed by John and Yoko, the single Give Peace A Chance was credited to the band. 2011 : The B-52's play their first ever show in Idaho, finally performing their song Private Idaho in the state that inspired it.
